patches.hypothesis: Refined the patch to handle general cases, edge cases, and identified overfitting patterns.
patches.original_hypothesis: The method was not properly checking the types of the input arrays before combining them into a new array, leading to an ArrayStoreException when incompatible types were encountered.

patches.hypothesis: The type of the newly created array was determined by the first array, but the second array was not checked for compatibility. The `addAll` method was also not properly handling the case where the first array was null.
patches.changes: + Check if second array is null and throw an exception if it is. + Use the type of the second array if the first array is null. + Check if arrays are compatible and throw an exception if they are not. + Use a more specific exception type for the incompatible types error.
patches.diff: + Check if second array is null and throw an exception if it is. + Use the type of the second array if the first array is null. + Check if arrays are compatible and throw an exception if they are not. + Use a more specific exception type for the incompatible types error.
